comment:
$$2\sin x\cos x-2\sin x+2\cos x-2=0 \ | : 2\\ \sin x(\cos x-1)+(\cos x-1)=0\\ (\sin x+1)(\cos x-1)=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \cos x=1\\ \sin x=-1 \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=-\frac{\pi }{2} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=-\frac{\pi}{2}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\).
